title: Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: The AnerDam Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Shirpur talukas of Dhule district, India.
overview.description: The AnerDam Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Shirpur talukas of Dhule district, India. The sanctuary is spread over southwestern side of Satpura hill ranges. This sanctuary is spread around the catchment area of Aner river specially above the high flood level around the Aner Dam. This sanctuary has common boundary with Yawal Wildlife Sanctuary in Jalgaon district and forest area of Khargone district in Madhyapradesh.

topPlaces.name: Dahiwad, Shirpur
topPlaces.description: Dahiwad is a village in Shirpur taluka of Dhule district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village has the Smita Patil Public School run by the Smita Patil Charitable Trust under the chairmanship of Shivajirao Girdhar Patil, father of Hindi film actress Smita Patil in whose memory the school is founded.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jalgaon Airport (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Aurangabad Railway Station (166 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aner Dam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dahiwad, Shirpur.
